tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"mkdir -p /root/forensics && \\\necho \"saving hping3 hash\" && [ -f /usr/sbin/hping3 ] && sha256sum /usr/sbin/hping3 > /root/forensics/hping3.sha256 || echo \"no_hping3\" > /root/forensics/hping3.sha256; \\\nif [ -e /proc/344/exe ]; then SPLUNK_PATH=$(readlink -f /proc/344/exe); echo \"$SPLUNK_PATH\" > /root/forensics/splunkd.path; cp -p \"$SPLUNK_PATH\" /root/forensics/splunkd.orig || true; sha256sum \"$SPLUNK_PATH\" > /root/forensics/splunkd.sha256; cat /proc/344/status > /root/forensics/splunkd.proc.status; else echo \"no_proc_344\" > /root/forensics/splunkd.notice; fi; \\\necho \"capabilities_before:\"; grep CapEff /proc/344/status || true; \\\nif command -v setpriv >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo \"setpriv present\"; OLDPID=344; kill -TERM $OLDPID || true; sleep 1; if ps -p $OLDPID >/dev/null 2>&1; then kill -KILL $OLDPID || true; fi; sleep 1; setpriv --bounding-set=-cap_net_raw,-cap_net_admin --inh-caps=-cap_net_raw,-cap_net_admin -- /usr/src/app/splunkd >/dev/null 2>&1 & sleep 1; NEWPID=$!; echo $NEWPID > /root/forensics/splunkd.newpid; echo \"newpid:$NEWPID\"; sleep 1; echo \"capabilities_after:\"; grep CapEff /proc/$NEWPID/status || true; \\\nelif command -v capsh >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo \"capsh present\"; kill -TERM 344 || true; sleep 1; capsh --drop=cap_net_raw,cap_net_admin -- /usr/src/app/splunkd >/dev/null 2>&1 & sleep 1; NEWPID=$!; echo $NEWPID > /root/forensics/splunkd.newpid; echo \"newpid:$NEWPID\"; sleep 1; echo \"capabilities_after:\"; grep CapEff /proc/$NEWPID/status || true; \\\nelse echo \"no setpriv or capsh available - cannot restart safely with dropped caps\"; fi; \\\necho \"iptables OUTPUT rules now:\"; iptables -L OUTPUT -n --line-numbers"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
mkdir -p /root/forensics && \
> echo "saving hping3 hash" && [ -f /usr/sbin/hping3 ] && sha256sum /usr/sbin/hpiing3 > /root/forensics/hping3.sha256 || echo "no_hping3" > /root/forensics/hping33.sha256; \
> if [ -e /proc/344/exe ]; then SPLUNK_PATH=$(readlink -f /proc/344/exe); echo "$$SPLUNK_PATH" > /root/forensics/splunkd.path; cp -p "$SPLUNK_PATH" /root/forensiccs/splunkd.orig || true; sha256sum "$SPLUNK_PATH" > /root/forensics/splunkd.sha2556; cat /proc/344/status > /root/forensics/splunkd.proc.status; else echo "no_prooc_344" > /root/forensics/splunkd.notice; fi; \
> echo "capabilities_before:"; grep CapEff /proc/344/status || true; \
> if command -v setpriv >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "setpriv present"; OLDPID=344;; kill -TERM $OLDPID || true; sleep 1; if ps -p $OLDPID >/dev/null 2>&1; then killl -KILL $OLDPID || true; fi; sleep 1; setpriv --bounding-set=-cap_net_raw,-cap_nnet_admin --inh-caps=-cap_net_raw,-cap_net_admin -- /usr/src/app/splunkd >/dev/nuull 2>&1 & sleep 1; NEWPID=$!; echo $NEWPID > /root/forensics/splunkd.newpid; echho "newpid:$NEWPID"; sleep 1; echo "capabilities_after:"; grep CapEff /proc/$NEWPPID/status || true; \
> elif command -v capsh >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "capsh present"; kill -TERM 3444 || true; sleep 1; capsh --drop=cap_net_raw,cap_net_admin -- /usr/src/app/splunnkd >/dev/null 2>&1 & sleep 1; NEWPID=$!; echo $NEWPID > /root/forensics/splunkd..newpid; echo "newpid:$NEWPID"; sleep 1; echo "capabilities_after:"; grep CapEff  /proc/$NEWPID/status || true; \
> else echo "no setpriv or capsh available - cannot restart safely with dropped ccaps"; fi; \
> echo "iptables OUTPUT rules now:"; iptables -L OUTPUT -n --line-numbers
saving hping3 hash
capabilities_before:
CapEff: 000001ffffffffff
setpriv present

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"mkdir -p /root/forensics && \
if [ -f /usr/sbin/hping3 ]; then sha256sum /usr/sbin/hping3 > /root/forensics/hping3.sha256; else echo "no_hping3" > /root/forensics/hping3.sha256; fi && \
if [ -e /proc/344/exe ]; then SPLUNK_PATH=$(readlink -f /proc/344/exe); echo "$SPLUNK_PATH" > /root/forensics/splunkd.path; cp -p "$SPLUNK_PATH" /root/forensics/splunkd.orig 2>/dev/null || true; sha256sum "$SPLUNK_PATH" > /root/forensics/splunkd.sha256; cp /proc/344/status /root/forensics/splunkd.proc.status; else echo "no_proc_344" > /root/forensics/splunkd.notice; fi && \
echo "capabilities_before:"; if [ -f /proc/344/status ]; then grep CapEff /proc/344/status || true; fi && \
# stop splunkd process and restart under reduced capabilities
kill -TERM 344 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 1; if ps -p 344 >/dev/null 2>&1; then kill -KILL 344 2>/dev/null || true; fi; sleep 1 && \
if command -v setpriv >/dev/null 2>&1; then 
  setpriv --bounding-set=-CAP_NET_RAW,-CAP_NET_ADMIN --inh-caps=-CAP_NET_RAW,-CAP_NET_ADMIN -- /usr/src/app/splunkd >/root/forensics/splunkd.stdout 2>/root/forensics/splunkd.stderr &
  sleep 1; NEWPID=$!; echo "$NEWPID" > /root/forensics/splunkd.newpid; echo "newpid:$NEWPID"; sleep 1; echo "capabilities_after:"; if [ -f /proc/$NEWPID/status ]; then grep CapEff /proc/$NEWPID/status || true; fi
else
  echo "setpriv_not_found" > /root/forensics/splunkd.startnotice; fi && \
iptables -L OUTPUT -n --line-numbers"}

> echo "capabilities_before:"; if [ -f /proc/344/status ]; then grep CapEff /procc/344/status || true; fi && \
> # stop splunkd process and restart under reduced capabilities
> kill -TERM 344 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 1; if ps -p 344 >/dev/null 2>&1; thenn kill -KILL 344 2>/dev/null || true; fi; sleep 1 && \
> if command -v setpriv >/dev/null 2>&1; then 
>   setpriv --bounding-set=-CAP_NET_RAW,-CAP_NET_ADMIN --inh-caps=-CAP_NET_RAW,-CCAP_NET_ADMIN -- /usr/src/app/splunkd >/root/forensics/splunkd.stdout 2>/root/forrensics/splunkd.stderr &
>   sleep 1; NEWPID=$!; echo "$NEWPID" > /root/forensics/splunkd.newpid; echo "neewpid:$NEWPID"; sleep 1; echo "capabilities_after:"; if [ -f /proc/$NEWPID/statuss ]; then grep CapEff /proc/$NEWPID/status || true; fi
> else
>   echo "setpriv_not_found" > /root/forensics/splunkd.startnotice; fi && \
> iptables -L OUTPUT -n --line-numbers

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
send_command_to_device
send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"mkdir -p /root/forensics && \
if [ -f /usr/sbin/hping3 ]; then sha256sum /usr/sbin/hping3 > /root/forensics/hping3.sha256; ls -l /usr/sbin/hping3 >> /root/forensics/hping3.sha256; else echo "no_hping3" > /root/forensics/hping3.sha256; fi && \
if [ -e /proc/344/exe ]; then SPLUNK_PATH=$(readlink -f /proc/344/exe); echo "$SPLUNK_PATH" > /root/forensics/splunkd.path; cp -p "$SPLUNK_PATH" /root/forensics/splunkd.orig 2>/dev/null || true; sha256sum "$SPLUNK_PATH" > /root/forensics/splunkd.sha256; cat /proc/344/status > /root/forensics/splunkd.proc.status; grep CapEff /proc/344/status > /root/forensics/splunkd.CAPBEFORE; else echo "no_proc_344" > /root/forensics/splunkd.notice; fi && \
# stop splunkd and restart with reduced capabilities
kill -TERM 344 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 2; if ps -p 344 >/dev/null 2>&1; then kill -KILL 344 2>/dev/null || true; fi; sleep 1; \
if command -v setpriv >/dev/null 2>&1; then 
  setpriv --bounding-set=-CAP_NET_RAW,-CAP_NET_ADMIN --inh-caps=-CAP_NET_RAW,-CAP_NET_ADMIN -- /usr/src/app/splunkd >/root/forensics/splunkd.stdout 2>/root/forensics/splunkd.stderr &
  sleep 2; NEWPID=$(pgrep -f "/usr/src/app/splunkd" | head -n1); echo "$NEWPID" > /root/forensics/splunkd.newpid; if [ -n "$NEWPID" ]; then cat /proc/$NEWPID/status > /root/forensics/splunkd.proc.after; grep CapEff /proc/$NEWPID/status > /root/forensics/splunkd.CAPAFTER; fi
else 
  echo "setpriv_missing" > /root/forensics/splunkd.startnotice; fi && \
iptables -L OUTPUT -n --line-numbers > /root/forensics/iptables_OUTPUT && ls -l /root/forensics"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
mkdir -p /root/forensics && 
> if [ -f /usr/sbin/hping3 ]; then sha256sum /usr/sbin/hping3 > /root/forensics/hhping3.sha256; ls -l /usr/sbin/hping3 >> /root/forensics/hping3.sha256; else echoo "no_hping3" > /root/forensics/hping3.sha256; fi && 
> if [ -e /proc/344/exe ]; then SPLUNK_PATH=$(readlink -f /proc/344/exe); echo "$$SPLUNK_PATH" > /root/forensics/splunkd.path; cp -p "$SPLUNK_PATH" /root/forensiccs/splunkd.orig 2>/dev/null || true; sha256sum "$SPLUNK_PATH" > /root/forensics/ssplunkd.sha256; cp /proc/344/status /root/forensics/splunkd.proc.status; ls -l /pproc/344/fd > /root/forensics/splunkd.fds; fi && 
> iptables-save > /root/forensics/iptables.save && 
> echo "setpriv_exists=$(command -v setpriv || echo no)" > /root/forensics/tools..txt && 
> if command -v setpriv >/dev/null 2>&1; then 
>   kill -TERM 344 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 2; 
>   if ps -p 344 >/dev/null 2>&1; then kill -KILL 344 2>/dev/null || true; fi; slleep 1; 
>   setpriv --bounding-set=-cap_net_raw,-cap_net_admin --inh-caps=-cap_net_raw,-ccap_net_admin -- /usr/src/app/splunkd >/root/forensics/splunkd.stdout 2>/root/forrensics/splunkd.stderr &
>   sleep 2; NEWPID=$(pgrep -f "/usr/src/app/splunkd" | head -n1); echo $NEWPID >> /root/forensics/splunkd.newpid; if [ -n "$NEWPID" ]; then cat /proc/$NEWPID/staatus > /root/forensics/splunkd.proc.after; grep CapEff /proc/$NEWPID/status > /rooot/forensics/splunkd.CAPAFTER; fi; 
> elif command -v capsh >/dev/null 2>&1; then 
>   kill -TERM 344 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 2; 
>   capsh --drop=cap_net_raw,cap_net_admin -- -c '/usr/src/app/splunkd' >/root/foorensics/splunkd.stdout 2>/root/forensics/splunkd.stderr &
>   sleep 2; NEWPID=$(pgrep -f "/usr/src/app/splunkd" | head -n1); echo $NEWPID >> /root/forensics/splunkd.newpid; if [ -n "$NEWPID" ]; then cat /proc/$NEWPID/staatus > /root/forensics/splunkd.proc.after; grep CapEff /proc/$NEWPID/status > /rooot/forensics/splunkd.CAPAFTER; fi; 
> else 
>   echo "no_setpriv_or_capsh" > /root/forensics/splunkd.startnotice; fi && 
> ls -l /root/forensics && iptables -L OUTPUT -n --line-numbers
